body_html:
Krista I sent you 2 quotes, 1 for the food and 1 for the Bar, There is also this link to explain everything to you! Lets jump on a call and get things moving whenever you are ready.
WATCH THE VIDEO.
https://www.loom.com/share/4bdadcc2304f4b2e8213838499a12919

Your Comeketo Catering Quote is Attached!

To move forward, secure your date,

and lock in pricing, just reply with any changes

or let us know if it’s approved,

and we’ll send the catering agreement.



Not sure about final details?

That's totally fine!

Many customers secure their date

and pricing with a smaller package,

adding services as plans are finalized.


Here are the next steps,
✅ Approve or modify the attached quote within 14 days
✅ We’ll send a Catering Agreement and Deposit Request
✅ For new (1st time) venues, we’ll connect with them as well


Either way,
Excited to work together, and let me know what modifications (if any) you'd like to make!



P.S. The second half of your quote lists optional services that may be helpful for events like yours.

🔒 Secure your date now: our spots fill up fast, especially on weekends!

P.S.S. Even if your event is a year or two away, many customers appreciate the peace of mind in locking in today's prices with a small package you can always add more later! 🔒 Price lock is valid for up to 2 years.





-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website

this link to explain everything to you! Lets jump on a call and get things
moving whenever you are ready.

WATCH THE VIDEO.  
<https://www.loom.com/share/4bdadcc2304f4b2e8213838499a12919>

  
Your Comeketo Catering Quote is Attached!  
  
To move forward, secure your date,  
  

and lock in pricing, just reply with any changes

  

or let us know if it’s approved,

  

and we’ll send the catering agreement.  
  

  

  

Not sure about final details?

  

That's totally fine!

  

Many customers secure their date

  

and pricing with a smaller package,

  

adding services as plans are finalized.  
  
  

**Here are the next steps,**  
✅ Approve or modify the attached quote within 14 days  
✅ We’ll send a Catering Agreement and Deposit Request  
✅ For new (1st time) venues, we’ll connect with them as well

  

  

Either way,  
Excited to work together, and let me know what modifications (if any) you'd
like to make!  
  
  
  
**P.S.** The second half of your quote lists optional services that may be
helpful for events like yours.  
  

🔒 Secure your date now: our spots fill up fast, especially on weekends!

  

**P.S.S.** Even if your event is a year or two away, many customers appreciate
the peace of mind in locking in today's prices with a small package you can
always add more later! 🔒 Price lock is valid for **up to 2 years**.

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,

**Andre Raw**
